code:
import io
import string

let t_opt = io.read_line()
let t = match t_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(body)
mut i = 0
mut count = 0
mut token = ""

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(body, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if token == t
      count = count + 1
    end
    token = ""
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if token == t
  count = count + 1
end

print("count=#{count}")
